project.x-prompt: Which project to add deployment for?

appType.description: Application type. Auto-detected from the project build target; only pass this to override detection.

env.description: ADSP environment / access service to target: test = access-uat.alberta.ca (UAT — use for dev and pre-prod), prod = access.alberta.ca, dev = ADSP platform dev (restricted). Defaults to test.

accessToken.description: Access token for retrieving configuration from ADSP APIs.

database.description: Database type used by the service. When set, the deployment manifest references the appropriate Secret.

sandbox.description: Generate a sandbox deployment manifest (local image push, no ImageStream trigger).
